name: Lemon Pepper Steak and Potato Wedges
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Beef top-round steak, cut into one inch thick pieces
3 Baking potatoes, each cut into 6 lengthwise wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large plastic bag, combine lemon juice, 1 tablespoon olive oil, garlic, oregano, and 1/2 teaspoon lemon pepper seasoning. Place the steak in the bag and turn to coat thoroughly. Securely close the bag and marinate the beef in the refrigerator for 30 minutes, turning once.
2. Toss the potatoes with the remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil and 1/2 teaspoon lemon pepper seasoning until evenly coated. Remove the steak from the marinade.
3. Place the steak on one side of the rack in the broiler pan and arrange the potatoes on the other side. Position the pan under the broiler so that the surface of the meat is 3 to 4 inches from the heat.
4. Broil for 15 to 20 minutes, or until the steak reaches a temperature of rare (140°F) to medium (160°F), and the potatoes are tender. Turn the steak and potato wedges over once during cooking.
5. Using a sharp knife, carve the steak into thin slices and serve with the potatoes.
Serving size: 6 servings
Nutritional information per serving:
270 calories, 29 gm protein, 11 gm fat, 72 mg cholesterol, 13 gm carbohydrates, 58 mg sodium
